notes: C2922 Lead: ROOT CAUSE FIX — pause field was EMPTY {} despite C2918 saying 'paused'. Bolt ran 3 waste cycles (C2919-2921). Now EXPLICITLY paused in config. Trace C2902 found 'no horizontal scroll on any page' + fixed 6 touch-target issues. Trace continues #57/#73 to final confirmation. Bolt unpauses ONLY when Trace finds fixable bugs. 18 days to April 28 campaign. All other tasks blocked bectly. ACK 1104+1105+1106.

schema.pause: Map of agent_name to condition (paused or until_next_bolt_commit or until_lead_directive)
schema.force_next: Agent name to force as next scheduled, or null. Cleared after use.
schema.interval_override: Map of agent_name to run_every integer
